
```{r}
# Load required libraries with error handling
required_pkgs <- c("terra", "sf", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "lubridate", "stringr", "purrr")
for (pkg in required_pkgs) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop(paste("Package not installed:", pkg,
               ". Install with install.packages('", pkg, "')"))
  }
}

library(terra)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# USER INPUTS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

folder_path <- "D:\\Sentinel-2_Harmonized_Indices"    # Folder with *.tif
polygon_path <- "data\\BigBreak.shp"           # Polygon file
indices_to_plot <- c(1,10)                   # Example: plot band 1 and 3
plot_all_bands <- TRUE                       # Whether to plot all bands

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# READ ALL TIF FILES
# ---------------------------------------------------------

tif_files <- list.files(folder_path, pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)

if (length(tif_files) == 0) {
  stop("No .tif files found in folder.")
}

# Load polygon safely
try({
  poly <- st_read(polygon_path, quiet = TRUE)
}, silent = FALSE)

if (!inherits(poly, "sf")) {
  stop("Failed to load polygon file.")
}

poly_v <- vect(poly)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# FUNCTION: Extract per raster file with date parsing
# ---------------------------------------------------------
date_from_band <- substr(tif_path, 60, 67)
parse_date_from_name <- function(filename) {
  # Extract numeric sequences
  nums <- str_extract_all(basename(filename), "\\d+")[[1]]

  # Try YYYYMMDD
  date_try <- suppressWarnings(ymd(nums))
  if (any(!is.na(date_try))) return(date_try[!is.na(date_try)][1])

  # Try YYYY_DOY (e.g., 2020150)
  date_doy_try <- suppressWarnings(
    map(nums, function(x) {
      if (nchar(x) == 7) {
        yr <- substr(x, 1, 4)
        doy <- substr(x, 5, 7)
        return(ymd(paste0(yr, "-01-01")) + days(as.numeric(doy) - 1))
      }
      return(NA)
    }) %>% unlist()
  )

  if (any(!is.na(date_doy_try))) return(date_doy_try[!is.na(date_doy_try)][1])

  return(NA)
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# PROCESS EACH RASTER
# ---------------------------------------------------------

extract_for_file <- function(tif_path) {
  r <- try(rast(tif_path), silent = TRUE)
  if (!inherits(r, "SpatRaster")) stop(paste("Failed to read:", tif_path))

  # Align CRS if needed
  if (!is.na(crs(r)) && !is.na(crs(poly_v))) {
    if (crs(r) != crs(poly_v)) {
      poly_v_local <- project(poly_v, crs(r))
    } else {
      poly_v_local <- poly_v
    }
  }

  vals <- extract(r, poly_v_local)[1, -1] %>% as.numeric()
  band_count <- nlyr(r)

  # Assign names: file-band
  band_names <- paste0(basename(tif_path), "_band", seq_len(band_count))

  # Parse date
  dt <- parse_date_from_name(date_from_band)
  if (is.na(dt)) stop(paste("Cannot parse date from:", date_from_band))

  data.frame(
    file = basename(tif_path),
    band_index = seq_len(band_count),
    value = vals,
    date = dt,
    julian_day = yday(dt),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Extract from all rasters
ts_df <- map_dfr(tif_files, extract_for_file)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# PLOT FUNCTIONS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

plot_indices <- function(df, idx) {
  df %>%
    filter(band_index %in% idx) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = date, y = value, color = factor(band_index))) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Time Series for Selected Bands:", paste(idx, collapse = ", ")),
      x = "Date",
      y = "Value",
      color = "Band"
    )
}

plot_indices_julian <- function(df, idx) {
  df %>%
    filter(band_index %in% idx) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = julian_day, y = value, color = factor(band_index))) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Julian Day Plot for Bands:", paste(idx, collapse = ", ")),
      x = "Julian Day",
      y = "Value",
      color = "Band"
    )
}

plot_all <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = date, y = value, color = factor(band_index))) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 1.5) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = "Time Series for All Bands",
      x = "Date",
      y = "Value",
      color = "Band"
    )
}

plot_all_julian <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = julian_day, y = value, color = factor(band_index))) +
    geom_point(size = 1.8) +
    geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = "Julian Day Plot for All Bands",
      x = "Julian Day",
      y = "Value",
      color = "Band"
    )
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# EXECUTE PLOTS
# ---------------------------------------------------------

if (length(indices_to_plot) > 0) {
  print(plot_indices(ts_df, indices_to_plot))
  print(plot_indices_julian(ts_df, indices_to_plot))
}

if (plot_all_bands) {
  print(plot_all(ts_df))
  print(plot_all_julian(ts_df))
}

# Optionally save
ggsave("selected_indices_timeseries.png", plot_indices(ts_df, indices_to_plot), width = 8, height = 4)
ggsave("all_bands_timeseries.png", plot_all(ts_df), width = 8, height = 4)

```
